RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0014 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Lena Cohen Date of Birth: 28/05/1990 SSN (tokenized): TKN-666397 Annual Income: $154,000 Employer: Umbrella Co Loan Amount: $35,000 Term (months): 36 Branch: Austin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN58337AL Hyundai Model 3 2023 ICE Used 18,000 Authorized Signature: Lena Cohen
